_what_this_is: Per-show usage log for archive_memories.json items. obs-helper writes to this file at runtime; the build tools read it to filter the pool for the NEXT show. The convention: each show's foyer-pack contains its OWN archive-rotation-state.json that it writes to during the run.
_lifecycle: 1. New show starts. archive-rotation-state.json begins empty.
2. obs-helper picks archive items from archive_memories.json (the static library), filtered by the global cross-show log (see below).
3. Each time an archive item plays, obs-helper writes an entry to this file with timestamp and night id.
4. After the show closes, the build tools COPY this file's used IDs into a GLOBAL log (see global-archive-history.json) before the next show starts authoring.
5. The next show's archive_memories.json filter is: 'exclude any id present in global-archive-history.json from the last N shows'.
_example_only: This file is illustrative — obs-helper would generate it at runtime. The real file would not be hand-edited.
